description_long: This is a modern, minimalist bench with a long, rectangular seat surface and four angled legs. The seat appears to be made of a dark, smooth material, possibly wood or composite, with a subtle matte finish. There is a distinctive notch or cut-out detail on one side of the seat, adding a unique visual element to the otherwise simple design. The legs are sturdy and slightly splayed, likely constructed from metal or painted wood, providing stability and a contemporary look. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing its streamlined, functional form. Its proportions and style suggest it is suitable for public spaces such as parks, sidewalks, or urban plazas.
description: A sleek, rectangular bench with a dark, smooth seat and four angled legs, featuring a unique notch detail on one side. The design is minimalist and modern, suitable for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the bench, the notch detail on the left, and both front legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bench and the thickness of the seat surface.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous seat surface and the absence of the notch on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bench's slim profile and leg placement.
